case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. DORA CAMPOS et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-22-2008 CONTINUED TO MAY-09-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-18-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-09-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, DORA DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-22-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-21-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-07-2008
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-18-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
